source: In principio creavit Deus caelum et terram.
english: In the beginning God created heaven and earth.

source: Dixitque Deus: Fiat lux. Et facta est lux.
english: And God said: Let there be light. And there was light.

source: Vide Augustinum, De Genesi ad litteram.
english: See Augustine, On the Literal Meaning of Genesis.
